finding: Broker conflict decisions, compose-vs-serialize decisions, parallel-entry admission, and conflict-resolution correctness are not yet first-class telemetry observations in the coverage summary.
expectedBehavior: Telemetry should record broker decision inputs/outcomes, whether agents were allowed to enter parallel work before conflict analysis, whether writes could be composed, and whether the resolution later proved correct or caused rework.
evidenceOrRepro: The final `docs/reports/captain-parallel-ledger-analysis.md` reports broker tickets=1, correctness samples=0, parallel admission=0.00%, compose acceptance=n/a, and broker verdict=inconclusive because outcomeRef/decisionCorrect samples are absent. The synthetic fixture proves analyzer shape only, not live conflict-resolution correctness.
followUp: Emit live broker decision/outcome pairs with decisionClass, conflict set/axis, parallel-admission attempt and reason, compose candidate/decision/group, wait time, downstream rework or escaped conflict, owner override, and delayed correctness verdict. Require analyzer joins against outcomeRef before claiming broker improvement.
